data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for post-experience photo sharing, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The lack of specific evidence regarding how photos are shared post-experience indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or functionality of post-experience photo sharing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
